Professional-grade hot-applied asphalt crack sealer designed for commercial pavement maintenance. Provides superior bonding and waterproof seal.
Strong adhesive bonding to asphalt and concrete

## Product Overview

Our commercial-grade asphalt crack sealer is formulated for professional pavement maintenance contractors. 
It provides a durable, flexible seal that prevents water intrusion and extends pavement life.

## Application

Ideal for highways, parking lots, airport runways, and commercial driveways. 
Apply with standard hot-applied crack sealing equipment.

## Benefits

- Reduces pavement maintenance costs by preventing crack expansion
- Extends pavement service life by 3-5 years when properly applied
- Meets ASTM D6690 specifications

New Product Line Launch: Advanced Road Sealant Series
We're excited to announce our new line of advanced road sealant products designed for extreme weather conditions.

## Introduction

Shenyang Shining Road Technology is proud to announce the launch of our new Advanced Road Sealant Series, 
specially formulated for extreme weather conditions ranging from -40°C to 80°C.

## Key Improvements

The new series features several improvements over our standard line:

- **Enhanced bonding** — 30% stronger adhesion to aged asphalt surfaces
- **Wider temperature range** — Performs reliably in both extreme cold and heat
- **Faster curing** — Reduces traffic closure time by up to 40%
- **Eco-friendly** — Lower VOC emissions during application

## Availability

The new product line is available for immediate ordering. Contact our sales team for pricing and samples.
